title: Coin Interaction
description: Players can pick up and drop coins in the treasury view. This adds tactile satisfaction and potentially enables spending directly from the treasury. Coins have physics when dropped.
definition-of-done: Coins are pickable objects. Picked coins follow cursor/controller. Dropped coins have physics. Optional: spending via coin manipulation.
testing-plan: Verify coins can be picked up. Test following cursor. Verify drop physics. Test any spending integration.
